ops.text:
FULL-FRAME PAIRED-DELONG VALIDATION COMPLETE — CARD VERDICT: RESOLVED NEGATIVE (actionable LOSS, do NOT promote). 2026-07-19.

Config full-frame-validated: L8 · mag16 · sign=-1, alpha=-0.44084 (=-16/norm[8], norm[8]=36.294). Scored through the DEPLOYMENT path MlxDrafter (base Qwen3-8B-4bit + v002 LoRA, render v2) on the 628-row watcher frame (digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0, 335 pos / 293 neg). Internal timing: base arm 628 passes ~1536s, steer arm 628 passes ~1677s (~55min compute; wall longer under load ~45).

INSTRUMENT CHECK: base arm vs stored v002 per-row probs max|diff| = 0.000e+00 (EXACT). Independent sklearn recompute of both arms' AUC from persisted probs matches summary to 0.00e+00. Scoring path validated end-to-end in-run.

RESULTS (paired fast-DeLong, Sun & Xu 2014, both arms' per-row probs persisted):
- AUC base   = 0.9316896744944222 (== card stored/incumbent AUC exactly)
- AUC steer  = 0.9062859762620346
- delta      = -0.02540369823 (steered WORSE)
- SE_base=0.009982  SE_steer=0.011942  SE_delta=0.006008  measured rho=0.86470  z=-4.228
- CI95 paired = [-0.037179, -0.013628]  -> EXCLUDES ZERO (both bounds negative)
- mde_paired  = 0.016832 (=2.8016*SE_delta at measured rho 0.865)
- CARD RULE: ci_excludes_zero=TRUE AND |delta|=0.02540 >= mde_paired 0.01683 => BOTH conditions met => the effect is RESOLVED beyond the noise floor. Direction is NEGATIVE => a resolved LOSS, not a win. |delta| also note: 0.0254 < unpaired card MDE 0.0453, but the paired test governs (both probs persisted, rho measured) per the card.

Intervention was real & substantial (not a no-op): 468/628 rows moved P(NO_STEER) by >0.01, mean|move|=0.088, max|move|=0.560; mean P(NO_STEER) 0.360->0.419 (neg alpha biases toward abstain, as designed) — yet it degrades discrimination.

INTERPRETATION: The base-only golden screen picked the config that rescues a near-chance base-only discriminator (golden baseline AUC 0.42 -> 0.63). That same large negative L8 vector applied to the strong deployed base+v002 model (AUC 0.9317) HURTS it by a statistically resolved -0.0254. This is the pre-registered caveat realized. E27 CONCLUSION: CAA at the best golden-screened config is NOT a promotion candidate; it is a resolved degradation of the watcher. Promotion (drafter_mlx.patch) is not this arm's job and is contraindicated for this config.

FOLLOW-UP OPTIONS (not executed — task scoped to single best screened config; each full-frame is ~55min under current load): (a) full-frame a POSITIVE-sign / smaller-mag config since the screen's sign ranking is a base-only artifact; (b) re-extract vectors on the base+v002 model (adapter) so screen and deploy paths match; (c) accept E27 as a negative result and close. Recommend the campaign synthesizer decide.

ARTIFACTS (kept for verify lane): out/vectors.npz (+meta.json), out/eval_auc.json (golden 31-config sweep), out/fullframe_summary.json, out/fullframe_scores.npz (ids/labels/p_base/p_steer/stored/fire_base/fire_steer), out/fullframe_scores.jsonl (per-row), out/fullframe.log. SPEND: $0.00 (all local MLX; no LLM API calls; $2 incidental cap untouched).
